message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing true
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #DDDDFF
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorBackgroundColor white
  ArrowColor black
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #DDDDFF
  BorderColor black
}
skinparam collections {
  BackgroundColor #99FF99
  BorderColor black
}
skinparam control {
  BackgroundColor #DDDDFF
  BorderColor black
}
skinparam entity {
  BackgroundColor #DDDDFF
  BorderColor black
}
skinparam boundary {
  BackgroundColor #DDDDFF
  BorderColor black
}

actor Foo1 as Foo1
boundary Foo2 as Foo2
database Foo5 as Foo5
collections "I have a really\nlong name" as LongName
entity Foo4 as Foo4
control "Foo3()" as Foo3

Foo1 -> Foo2 : To boundary
Foo1 -> Foo3 : To control
Foo1 -> Foo4 : To entity
Foo1 -> Foo5 : To database
Foo1 -> LongName : To collections
Foo1 <- Foo1 : To actor

@enduml
